name: AI Assistant SaaS
description: Subscription AI assistant starter with passwordless auth, Neon data, and hosted checkout.
siteDescription: AI assistant membership app with login, workspace billing, and paid access.
prompt: Create an AI assistant SaaS with database support, member login, and hosted checkout.

home.headline: Charge for your assistant before you scale your agent stack.
home.description: SignalDesk AI is a payment-ready SaaS shell for private assistants, premium copilots, and member-only workflows.
proofPoints: Email login for paid assistant accounts
Hosted checkout for monthly or annual access
Neon-backed schema layer for threads, credits, and seats

pricing.headline: Unlock the assistant for
pricing.description: One subscription. Faster answers. Team-ready workflows.
pricing.defaultProductDescription: Unlimited assistant access for your team.

templateSurface.headline: Turn this starter into a paid assistant product.
templateSurface.description: Replace the marketing layer with your workflow, then connect billing events to credits, seats, or premium tools.
bullets: Model conversations, credits, and tool runs in your database
Grant assistant entitlements after successful checkout
Swap the placeholder UI for your chat workspace

aiAssistant.title: Offer a live assistant from day one.
aiAssistant.description: Use the built-in concierge to demo your product, qualify buyers, or answer member questions without exposing upstream secrets.
aiAssistant.welcomeMessage: I can explain plans, demo workflows, or answer product questions. Ask me anything about your assistant offer.
aiAssistant.placeholder: Ask about plans, workflows, or how this assistant product works...
suggestedPrompts: What does the Pro Assistant plan include?
How should I structure credits and seats?
What should happen after a successful checkout?
aiAssistant.systemPrompt: You are SignalDesk Copilot, a concise presales and onboarding assistant for an AI assistant SaaS. Answer in clear product language, focus on pricing, setup, and workflow design, and avoid making claims about features that are not visible in the current template.

name: Prompt Library Membership
description: Paid prompt library starter with auth, Neon persistence, and member checkout.
siteDescription: Prompt membership app with gated content access and recurring billing.
prompt: Create a paid prompt library membership product with database support and hosted checkout.

home.headline: Package your best prompts like a premium product.
home.description: PromptVault gives creators a clean paid-access shell for prompt packs, workflows, and member-only resources.
proofPoints: Member login for gated prompt access
Recurring checkout for library subscriptions
Database foundation for packs, tags, and unlock history

pricing.headline: Join the vault for
pricing.description: One plan. Every prompt pack. New drops included.
pricing.accessLabel: Prompt packs, updates, and premium workflows
pricing.defaultProductDescription: Get every prompt pack and member-only update.

templateSurface.headline: Publish prompts without rebuilding auth and billing.
templateSurface.description: Use the starter to ship a premium content library fast, then add browsing, search, and unlock states.
bullets: Create tables for prompt packs, authors, and release notes
Map paid members to content entitlements
Replace placeholder sections with searchable library pages

aiAssistant.title: Turn your prompt catalog into a guided buying experience.
aiAssistant.description: Give visitors a short, strong assistant that recommends packs, explains access, and helps members find the right workflows.
aiAssistant.welcomeMessage: I can help visitors understand the library, recommend prompt packs, and explain membership access.
aiAssistant.placeholder: Ask which prompts fit your workflow or what membership includes...
suggestedPrompts: What kinds of prompt packs should I launch first?
How can I explain membership value quickly?
What content should be free vs members-only?
aiAssistant.systemPrompt: You are PromptVault Guide, a concise assistant for a paid prompt library. Help users understand pack structure, membership value, and discovery strategy. Keep answers practical, concise, and grounded in the visible template.

How do I map payment to portal access?

aiAssistant.title: Answer enrollment questions before a human has to.

How do I present cohort dates and seat limits?
What student onboarding data should I store?
aiAssistant.systemPrompt: You are CohortOS Advisor, a concise enrollment assistant for a cohort-based course business. Help with seat reservation, onboarding, curriculum questions, and payment flow expectations. Do not invent unsupported operational details.
